B001.description: Locate the final commit, branch, tags, release pages, assets, and CI run produced by the current closeout.

B002.description: Verify all frozen historical tags and archives remain byte-identical.

B003.description: Inventory dirty, untracked, generated, scratch, and proof files without deleting unrelated work.

B008.description: Write a machine-readable handoff snapshot with repository, environment, sources, blockers, and next actions.

B009.description: Register every new source with title, authors, DOI, local hash, publication state, and access status.

B010.description: Extract page- or section-level provenance for every imported equation and numerical claim.

L001.description: Record factual observations separately from feelings, interpretations, and later outcomes.

L002.description: Record dates, approximate times, locations, participants, and confidence only when user supplied.

L005.description: Preserve the sense of connection to Dan and the research as interpretation, not a factual transfer claim.

L006.description: Preserve sudden engineering intuitions and track which later generated useful implementations.

L011.description: Record source-system conditions and forbidden transfers before implementation.

L012.description: Implement staged skim, source-read, translation, toy-model, relevance-test, and disposition triage.

L013.description: Track hits, partial hits, nulls, false analogies, duplicates, and abandoned leads symmetrically.

L014.description: Add prospective usefulness scoring before outcomes are known.

L015.description: Link productive leads to artifacts without upgrading intuition to evidence.

L016.description: Generate calibration reports on productive and noisy intuition categories and search diversity.
